task_description: Rewrite generate_excel.py to produce Kalkulator_Premi_MiUHC.xlsx with identical structure to kalkulator_MIUHC.xlsx reference, extracting premium data from both Syariah and Konvensional PDFs, adding a new Syariah sheet, and ensuring lookup formulas work correctly.
